summary: Iteration 43 - Verified all fixes mentioned: OTP verification MSG91 handling, staff login password_hash, removed duplicate HR panel, removed Instagram from Contact, changed to 'Book Solar Service', WhatsApp booking link. All 13 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ OTP verification now properly waits for MSG91 callback and checks window.otpVerificationStatus
✅ HR employee sync stores password_hash (hashlib.sha256) instead of plain password
✅ Staff login checks both password_hash and legacy password field for backwards compatibility
✅ AdminDashboard.js has only ONE HR Management module in the modules array
✅ Contact.js has Facebook but NO Instagram in Follow Us section
✅ 'Book Solar Service' text replaces 'Book Free Survey' on homepage and ZeroBillHero
✅ Book Solar Service links to WhatsApp (wa.me/919296389097) not a modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported fixes verified working: 1) OTP verification properly handles MSG91 responses, 2) Staff login uses password_hash for verification, 3) Only ONE HR Management card in admin dashboard, 4) Instagram removed from Contact page, 5) 'Book Solar Service' replaces 'Book Free Survey', 6) WhatsApp link used for booking instead of modal, 7) HR to CRM employee sync stores password_hash. Staff login has 3 tabs: Password, Email OTP, Mobile OTP. Admin login has 2 tabs: Password, Mobile OTP.
